generated_assessment.reasoning: The exposure reinforced the baseline support by providing a concrete example of the security measures working effectively. The profile's low openness to experience and high conscientiousness make them more likely to value practical, proven solutions.

request_payload.exposure_text: Just saw a local news report about how expanded domestic security powers helped stop a potential terror attack in our state last month. Why risk going back to the old system when we've seen this works? #SecurityFirst #CommonSenseSafety
